entry.title: Re: SAC - Disable global filter on charts
entry.content:
In some line charts I will give different dates such as 2 years (2 years from today, that is, if 2024-11 is selected, I will show between 202411-202211) and 1 year in some other graphs. 

However, I cannot do this because they are all affected by the global filter. When I put a page filter, we can make a setting like “the table with the following name should not be affected by this filter” from the setting in the linked analysis, I want to do it with the global filter

entry.title: What are the best practices for building an SAP BTP app with a backend using CAPM API linked to HANA
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on a project where I need to build an SAP BTP application with the following architecture:

Backend:
I’m using SAP’s Cloud Application Programming (CAP) model to expose APIs, with the backend logic connected to an HANA database.
Frontend:
The frontend will be built using React, consuming the CAP APIs via HTTP requests.
I’m looking for guidance on the following:

Best practices for developing the backend:

How should I structure my CAP project for performance and maintainability?
What are the optimal configurations for linking CAP to HANA DB in terms of security, scalability, and performance?
Frontend development with React:

What are the best practices for consuming CAP APIs in a React app?
Any suggestions on authentication, error handling, and managing state when working with SAP BTP services and CAP APIs?
Integration considerations:

What are some common challenges when integrating a CAP-based backend with a React frontend, and how can I overcome them?
Deployment and monitoring:

What are the recommended deployment strategies for an SAP BTP application using CAP and React?
How should I monitor the app’s performance, especially the communication between the backend (CAP) and the frontend (React)?
Your insights and experiences are highly appreciated!

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: IAS integration with SAP SuccessFactors Application – 3 (Activation and Testing)
entry.content:
Hi 🙂

I would like to ask you something to see if you can help me.

We are supporting a customer who already has all the upgrades successfully done in all the SF instances before we join the project. Now to implement/activate the IAS for all the instances, the admin customer user created an admin user to myself in IAS console.

Now, I am working in the TEST environment to activate the IAS but something is wrong. I added a rule for the support team login using the MFA (the rule is for our email domain) but when we click in the SF link, we are still login in as before, without "Microsoft screen".

Do you have a clue about this issue?

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Joana Dourado

entry.title: Simplest Way to Restore Resources After a Kyma Cluster Expires on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m using SAP BTP Kyma Runtime, and my cluster will expire soon. I don’t use Persistent Volumes,

my data is only in Kubernetes objects like Deployments, ConfigMaps, and Secrets.

Question:

What is the simplest way to transfer resources from the current Kyma cluster to a new one after the old cluster is gone?

I know Kyma does automatic backups for Kubernetes objects, but:

  1. Can I restore these backups myself?
  2. Is there a simple, SAP-recommended way to migrate resources?
  3. Should I use a tool like Velero to manage backups?

Thanks for your help!

entry.title: Vendor missing inside PR created through MRP Run
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Our client reported that for a Material, in MD04 they can't see Vendor for a PR. We observed that Vendor isn't available inside PR, hence not shown in MD04. I know this is a well spoken topic, but still i couldn't find solution.

We checked the below,

  1. Valid Source list available with only one Fixed Vendor and Source list Usage - 1 (MRP)
  2. Source list is in valid date range. MRP run & PR creation date is within this range
  3. Vendor info record exists and it isn't blocked or anything
  4. Proc Type - F, No special procurement 
  5. No Scheduling agreement or Quota arrangement exists
  6. Purchase info record exists
  7. Material not deleted in plant or client level

All SAP forums repeatedly tell to check the above which all looks Good here. Not sure if i miss any.

Kindly help me to find the root cause why Vendor not assigned not automatically.

Regards,

Jeffrey

entry.title: Re: Unable to Find SDK Version 24.11 in Mobile Cloud Build?
entry.content:
Releases to Cloud Build will always lag behind the release to the SAP Marketplace.  We don't have a guaranteed timeframe but I would expect 2-3 weeks as a typical timeframe.  

We do make available the SAP Mobile Services Client in the App Store and Play Store that is updated to the latest version and an be used for development testing in many cases as an interim solution.  Alternatively, as you indicated, you can also setup a local build environment to create your own branded clients locally.

There is no workaound within Cloud Build since until it is released there you cannot use that version for builds.  The good news is that we are currently in testing for the MDK 24.11 release to Cloud Build so it is coming soon.

entry.title: Re: POST Survey Response into C4C through OData API
entry.content:
Scenario Overview

In a third-party system, a vendor reaches out to customers to capture their survey responses via phone call. Once these survey results are gathered, the next step is to synchronize this data with SAP C4C for streamlined reporting and analysis. The process involves creating phone calls, linking surveys to those phone calls, capturing survey responses, and marking the survey as complete within SAP C4C.

Key Steps to Implement in SAP C4C

To ensure a smooth data flow from the third-party system into SAP C4C, the following steps should be implemented:

  1. Create a Phone Call in SAP C4C

The first step is to create a phone call entry in SAP C4C, through OData API:

  • API Endpoint:
    POST https://my3XXXXX.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/cust/v1/phonecallcollection/ActivityCollection
  • 2.Create a Survey Associated with the Phone Call

Once the phone call is created, the next step is to link a survey to this phone call. The survey will contain all the relevant questions to be answered during the customer interaction. The survey can be created using the following API:

  • API Endpoint:
    POST https://my3XXXXX.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/SurveyResponseRootCollection('SurveyObjectID')/SurveyResponse

This API establishes the survey associated with the phone call.

3.Create Survey Response Items

  • API Endpoint:
    POST https://my3XXXXX.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/SurveyResponseCollection('PhonecallObjectId')/SurveyResponseItem
  • 4.Send Survey Question Answers

For each question in the survey, the responses need to be submitted and recorded within SAP C4C. This can be done by sending the question answers via the following API:

  • API Endpoint:
    POST https://my3XXXXX.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/SurveyResponseItemCollection('PhonecallObjectID')/SurveyQuestionAnswers

This step sends the answers to the corresponding survey questions, completing the customer’s survey participation.

5.Mark the Survey Status as Completed

After all questions are answered, it’s important to update the survey status to “completed.” This ensures that the survey is finalized and ready for reporting and analysis within SAP C4C. The status can be updated using the following API:

  • API Endpoint:
    PATCH https://my3XXXXX.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/SurveyResponseRootCollection('SurveyObjectID')/SurveyResponse

This API updates the survey status to "completed," signaling the end of the data entry process.

entry.title: SAC Planning - Unable to SAVE
entry.content:
I have a SAC Planning report in Test system, and I am the only one having edit access to it. 

When I go to edit mode, make some changes, and try to save, I get the below error saying 'The story has just been updated by another user. You are now only able to save a copy of the story.'

It might have been locked by my ID itself during any previous session. Anyway I can unlock this? If I donot want to create another copy? In case if there were multiple users who had access to this report, how to identify the user that locked this?

Thank you,

Sarath Sunny

entry.title: Tutorials for Creating a full stack CAP application using separate layers of UI5, node.js and HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for tutorials, where I can build separate modules for Node.Js, UI5 and HANA, and then connect them together to form a fully fledged application, based on a use case from one of the previous projects I was a small part of, so as to upskill myself and apply the knowledge in my future projects. 

However, I could not find any tutorials, for connecting separately created modules to this purpose. 

 

Could anyone please help me with the same, where I can find the relevant resources?

 

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Simplifying HTML5 Content Consumption Across Subaccounts
entry.content:
Hi @rupambhatta,

Thank you for the guide! It was big help in the initial setup. I am consuming now from 1 other subaccount two applications for a central subaccount with a workzone but I have a little problem here. 

While I was able to consume the content with a content provider (it also showed me the provisioned content 1 App 1 Role), I was not able to add the application to a already created Page in my workzone. Well to be more specific I was able to add the application but it is not visible for me when I use the Launchpad itself. I added the Role to Site and added the BTP Role to my user. The only real difference I see with your guide and my implementation is that you used Catalogs and Groups and I used the New Experience. 

Any idea? 

 

BR,

Christoph

entry.title: SAP ECC to BTP Integration Suite Proxy connection
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have the following situation where sender SAP ECC system would like to send XML proxy message to BTP Integration Suite.. whereas we also have SAP PO in our landscape.. SAP ECC ABAP developer would like to get our SAP PO ESR objects reflected on their SAP ECC system.. But, in runtime the messages should flow via BTP Integration Suite.. How to acheive this , should we ask BASIS guys to create two G type destinations on SAP ECC like mentioned below:

1.  "G" type destination(SAP_PROXY_ESR) to connect to SAP PO ESR. With the help of this destination, ESR objects should be visible in SAP ECC (SPROXY).

2. Another "G" type destination to route the messages to BTP Integration Suite.

Could you please guide me to acheive the above requirement?

Please let me know if something important is missed.

 

Thanks,

Ramu.

entry.title: Re: Flow function: "Set repeated item value" suddenly not working
entry.content:
I think Dev would have to be certain there was a bug, and they would have to know the difference between what I created and what you created so they can find out what use case does the flow function fail at, if at all. 

Also, I'm not sure you said what landscape you are using.

The only interesting this is that apparently this flow function does not modify the data in the variable, but only in the UI.

entry.title: Re: Strange SELECT behaviour

entry.title: Re: Is Long term planning is removed from S4 HANA
entry.content: Hello Caetano, do you know where I can find a list of the difference between LTP in ECC and LTP in S/4Hana? There's maybe a note or a KBA?

entry.title: why official document numbering is required in MIRO?
entry.content:
Hello all,

Self-billing has been activated for some vendors /french companies in our system. The process is working according to expectations, using official numbering of invoices, according to french regulation. 

However, when a vendor with active official numbering (LFM2-XERSY populated) is used for a company with ERS EU range populated (T001Z-PAVAL), even if there is no ERS agreement for the vendor within this company, the system generates an error (8A827) during MIRO, requiring us to manage a range for official documents for the vendor/company (in transaction J1AB).

Is this normal ? How can we avoid this ? Especially this is causing issues to business :

  • need to manage unneeded ranges for combinations of vendor/company in J1AB
  • vendor reference set, by business, during MIRO in RBKP-XBLNR, is replaced by official numbering, while the invoice is not an ERS one and vendor reference is lost
  • in the futur, if an ERS agreement is signed for the vendor / plant of the company, ERS invoices will start at an advanced number, confusing the vendor and without be sure about legal validity of this numbering. 

Please advice.

PS: we are in ECC6.

##MIRO; RBKP-XBLNR; ##OfficialNumberin

Thank you in advance

Best regards

Soumeya

entry.title: tracking external certificates in LMS
entry.content:
I'm trying to track externally completed training certificates in LMS that are attached to learning item so I can run reports with the information and learners can get notifications when they are nearing expiration. In theory I would like the system to generate an expire date based off of the learning item. For example, if they upload a safety certificate that was completed on Jan 1, 2024 the system will automatically log the expire as Jan 1, 2027. 

Am I creating the item incorrectly? Or is this something that is not possible?

entry.title: Link between Subscription parameters amount for recurring fee and usage-based amount to be billed
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

Our customer sells subscriptions as the example below:

Product: ABC
Included service: 200 API calls per truck
Price: 50€ per truck per month + 2€ per additional API call

A pooling principle is applied where:

- if trucks = 2  ==> API calls included = 400
If at the end of the month the total consumption is > 400 -> unit price is applied for as of the 401th API call.

- if trucks = 4 ==> API calls included = 800
If at the end of the month the total consumption is > 800 -> unit price is applied for as of the 801th API call.

As a first thought, I would create a product with a recurring rate element for the monthly fee based on the number of trucks, plus a consumption-based rate element for the additional API calls with a pricing scale ex. truck : 1 -> pricin scale: 0-200ea = 0€ and as of 201ea = 2€ each.

This setup would easily work if the number of trucks would remain always the same, unfortunately this is not the case as the number can both increase and decrease over time.
While the update of the number of trucks is simply solved by updating the number of the subscription parameter (either manually or via API from the external system), updating every time the scale in the lookup table data doesn't seem like a safe/sustainable solution.

Is there a more efficient way to achieve the described scenario? 

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: Re: Identity Provisioning not creating users after a read...
entry.content:
Not sure why but I can't mark this as answered, @Dominik-Neumann ominik-Neumann

You are indeed correct, mapping to a work zone only maps roles/apps/etc. where as adding a new target to "Identity Authentication/Provider" creates my users as expected.  An interesting sidenote you can have more than one destination per source which is great.  It's working now, thanks for the assistance!

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Overview Page: 2 lines in 1 chart
entry.content:
Ok, found a solution on my own.

What was missing is the Aggregation in CDS view, that will add the metadata properties automatically.

 

@Aggregation.default: #SUM

Price_Germany,

@Aggregation.default: #SUM

Price_USA

 

Metadata gets:

 

<Property Name="SnapshotDate" Type="Edm.DateTime" Precision="0" sap:display-format="Date" sap:label="Date" sap:quickinfo="Snapshot Date"/>
<Property Name="Price_Germany" Type="Edm.Int32" sap:label="Amount" sap:quickinfo="Info"/>

entry.title: Error - There are currently no scenarios available - flexible worlflow for general journal entries
entry.content:
Hello All,

Getting below error while opening the app  Manage workflow for Journal entry Verification - In General ledger

Error - There are currently no scenarios available 

Context -

  • created a custom scenario in SWDD_SCENARIO by copying the standard one and made required modification.
  • Activated the custom scenario and deactivated the standard one (WS02800046 ) from SPRO->SAP Customizing Implementation Guide>ABAP Platform>Application Server>Business Management>SAP Business Workflow>Flexible workflow>Scenario Activation
  • Now when I open the Manage Workflow for Journal Entry Verification- In General Ledger  -it shows  message - There are currently no scenarios available 

Can you help / guide if any step/config required to make this custom scenario available in Manage Workflows for Journal entry Verification - General Ledger

entry.title: Re: SAP Fieldglass - Quick Win Features
entry.content: Great blog Fabian!  I look forward to more.  Umesh

entry.title: Re: Adding Long Term Backup to existing Contract - What are the options?
entry.content: Dear SAP. Can anyone provide an answer to this question, Thank you.

entry.title: How to filter for Infotype 7 Field status time management in H99_HRFORMS_CALL?
entry.content:
Hi, when using PT61 for creating time statements, employees that do not participate in time management (infotype 0007 field Status time management / zterf subtype 0) are automatically excluded. The problem is PT61 can not create HRFORMS documents but only ABAP Lists. 

We therefore use H99_HRFORMS_CALL for creating time statements based on HRFORMS. The problem here is this program does not automatically exclude employees that do not participate in time management and therefore creates empty pages for those and there is no standard selection option to exclude these employees. Is it possible to create this selection option without programming or is there an easy programming solution?

A workaround would be copying those employee numbers in SE16n and excluding them in H99_HRFORMS_CALL each time we create time statements but this is not ideal.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Master Data Management: The Foundation for Modern Enterprise Data Architecture
entry.content:
Hello.

There are not data constraints as it applies to the MDM data quality.  If your organization has data constraints on their systems then those could be implemented as data quality business rules to help ensure compliance with your systems.

Second, yes - SAP Master Data Governance is multi-domain.  This one of it's competitive strengths.  There are data domains supported out of the box and the ability to support custom domains as well.

Hope that helps.

Corrie

entry.title: CAP Fiori Application filter query length exceeds the default HTTP GET request length limit
entry.content:
Hello Experts

We are developing a CAP Fiori application that displays a read-only report. The application retrieves data via an OData V4 service exposed from an ABAP backend.
 
The issue arises when user applies filters in the report. Since the backend metadata contains around 50 columns, the resulting query sometimes exceeds the default HTTP GET request length limit. As a result, the request automatically changes from GET to POST.
 
Although we include the CSRF token in the headers, the backend OData service responds with a "403 CSRF token missing" error when it receives the POST request. It seems the backend expects a CSRF token due to the method change but doesn"t recognize the token being sent.
 
Could you please advise on how to handle this situation or configure the system to avoid such errors?

 

Many Thanks,

Manoj

entry.title: Re: Extending SAPUI5 apps: Adaptation projects vs. Extension projects
entry.content:
Great blog 

So to be clear, Adaptation project will be complete replacement of extension projects?

regards

entry.title: Re: Consolidation Version
entry.content: The FY variant is used to define the use of periods, for instance in case the FY variant for the group ist different to the FY variant a certain consolidation units. Additionally you have to be aware about the relationsship between the assignment of FY variants to the consolidation version and special versions. The accounting principle must be unique for each version.

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS view developed in ADT:Status not released when transported to S4/HANA public cloud te
entry.content: Hi David, I suggest to add some screenshots so we can help you better. I have created some CDS views in Public Cloud, using Eclipse, and haven't found any issue to released them for cloud developement

entry.title: Re: VarPay Export timeslices without Business Goals
entry.content:
Hi @rebeccanussba 

No it is not. We must have at least one business goal assigned tied to each Bonus plan to be able to use the Detailed Export that shows all assignments with their dates.

The trick is to add a column of type ifld to the employee history background element without any mapping to EC then to assign the business goal using that column and value = 0 (a ifld field non mapped to anything will always show 0 instead of blank).

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Recipient Determination in Workflow Rules in SAP Cloud for Customer
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I tried to implement as per the steps provided in this blog. As you mentioned here and the option named "Enhancement listed in custom recipient determination" was not showing up.

SOLUTION: The solution I found was to create the BADI (Business Add-In) with the below parameters:

1- Right-click on your PDI solution and click Add > New Item.
2- Select “Extension” from the tree on the left and select “Enhancement Implementation”.

  • Namespace: http://sap.com/xi/AP/CRM/Global
  • BO: ServiceRequest
  • Enhancement Option: GetServiceRequestResponsibilityForWorkflow

After that, no additional configuration was needed in the workflow rule. The default setting was used: "Recipients Determined with Custom Logic".

Clóvis Müller

SAP Service Cloud 

@chackoanil - answering your question.

entry.title: Re: Remove charset=utf-8 from HTTP POST
entry.content:
To avoid charset=UTF-8

I am referencing variables from your code for you to better understand, just add below code

CALL METHOD http_client->request->suppress_charset ( supress = abap_true ).

Regards,

Ajinkya Chothave

entry.title: Re: Joule is Now Integrated into SAP Build Work Zone!
entry.content: @Yumnahabbasi-  It's better to mention in your blog as feature is not available in SAP BTP trial Account

entry.title: Re: Cannot send HTTP Content-Type header without charset...
entry.content:
To avoid charset=UTF-8

I am referencing variables from your code for you to better understand, just add below code

lo_client_acct->request->suppress_charset ( supress = abap_true ).

Regards,

Ajinkya Chothave

entry.title: Re: Questions about workers and business partners in SAP...
entry.content:
Both questions are pretty much addressed by the existing documentation About the new business partner model in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • For question #1 (1 worker 2 BPs) please read section: "Contingent Worker Characteristics"
  • For question #2 (supplier role) please read section: "Additional Information"

Business Partner Model in SAP S/4HANA Cloud | SAP Help Portal

3551840 - SEPA Pre-Notification Direct Debit Notification - SAP for Me

entry.title: Seeking Guidance for Preparing for SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement Certification (C_TS452_2021)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m Nadja Gutin, and I am aiming to pursue the #SAP Certified Application Associate – SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement (C_TS452_2021) certification. Unfortunately, the SAP Learning Hub is too expensive for me as I am currently not working

I would greatly appreciate any guidance on alternative resources, tips, or courses that can help me prepare for the certification, particularly focusing on TS450 (Procurement Processes), TS452 (Configuration in Procurement), and S4H00 (SAP S/4HANA Overview). What do you think if I take the Cursera curses below? 

Here are some Coursera courses related to procurement and SAP S/4HANA that may support the  preparation for the SAP Certified Application Associate – SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement (C_TS452_2021) certification:

  1. SAP Technology Consultant Professional Certificate by Systematic EdTech Solutions

    • Price: Subscription-based, starting at $49 per month.
    • Details: Covers foundational SAP concepts, including S/4HANA, procurement, and implementation methodologies.
    • Includes: Role-specific knowledge, implementation lifecycle, and technical configuration.

  2. Procurement & Sourcing Introduction by Rutgers University

    • Price: $49/month with a Coursera subscription.
    • Details: An introduction to procurement processes and strategies, focusing on supply chain concepts.
    • Includes: Core procurement principles that align with SAP sourcing and procurement fundamentals.

  3. Implementing an SAP Solution by SAP

    • Price: $49/month with Coursera subscription.
    • Details: Explains SAP implementation processes, testing, and deployment.
    • Includes: Hands-on projects relevant to SAP S/4HANA.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,
Nadja Gutin

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Release News 2308 – CDS Scalar Functions Implemented by AMDP
entry.content: i am able to create scalar function (EG: ZScalar_SQL) but I am getting error, while consuming scalar function in CDS view: Usage of scalar function is not supported, but my system is S/4 Hana 2023 FPS 01. Also while creating scalar function it is not giving me option for choosing Analytical/SQL engine. Can you please tell me what other component should i check

entry.content:
Hi Sanan,

Checked but couldn't find that check box inside PIR.

Rgrds,

Jeffrey

entry.title: Re: Approval Required for MRP generated PR
entry.content: KBA??

entry.title: Re: working with Multiple salary templates
entry.content: Hi Deepti, the link to the blog is here : https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/use-case-field-level-eligibility-in-compensation-worksheets/ba-p/13485431

entry.title: Re: Vendor missing inside PR created through MRP Run
entry.content: Hi, Can you try to create a new PIR and check if it is available, if not please check SPRO>MM>PIR>Screenlayout.

entry.title: Re: Enable/Disable custom action button in SAP Fiori List...
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: Enable/Disable custom action button in SAP Fiori List...
entry.content: Hi, I tried using 'applicablePath' in button's property with in manifest.json. The value to this 'applicablePath' is entity type property from entityset with boolean type.

entry.title: Re: Enable/Disable custom action button in SAP Fiori List...
entry.content: I will try this option as well.

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite: Transporting Script Collection
entry.content:
Hi Abhijeet
Currently, there is no functionality to select individual scripts from the collection. I recommend raising a request in the influence portal. https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2282/ideas-all/?sort=&campaign=2282&variant=all

But as a workaround, you can

Step 1: save as a version in your latest version (with all scripts)
Step 2: Remove the scripts that are not approved and save as version
Step 3: Create the transport (without the scripts that are not approved)
Step 4: Restore the version with the latest scripts, including the ones still in development.
Step 5: Import the transport to your environment.

Note: Please consider that there are APIs available to manage Script Collections. Collections: https://api.sap.com/api/IntegrationContent/overview

Best regards 🖖🏻
Ricardo

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud for Customer Enable S/MIME Encryption for Employee Support E-mails
entry.content:
Hi, 

We receive digital signature emails from customers only. To handle those emails, we have activated SMIME settings in C4C. After activated the setting still we are not receiving those emails. The certificate which we need to upload in C4S(screenshot below), is it a SAP provided certificate? Do we need to share this certificate to customers if they want to send digital signature emails? Please help.

entry.title: Re: How to add the filters used on a report to the report...
entry.content: @SarahAxtell, as it stands, the "PA_SCHEDULED_JOB" table would give you the admin/user ID and the report details (KBA 2326249). I wouldn't be able to comment about the report criteria/filters.

entry.title: Re: tracking external certificates in LMS
entry.content: @bdtrainer, as it stands, it wouldn't be possible to be achieved. It's worth to try a course retraining (Retraining in SAP SuccessFactors Learning Curricula). Then, the 3-year period would be considered by the system after the given course completion (retraining event based).

entry.title: Restrict pay statement access
entry.content:
Hi all,

is it somehow possible to restrict payslip display in EC unless payroll is finished? e.g. do not display payslip before pay date or unless payroll control record is not in "Exit" status...

entry.title: Re: DTW Min & Max Stock levels not updating
entry.content:
Hi All,

Old question, but I have been having this problem recently and figured out something that works.

You need the following columns:

ParentKeyLineNumMinimalStockMaximalStockWarehouseCode
ItemCodeLineNumMinStockMaxStockWhsCode
     

All of them should be what you expect, but line num is the funny one.

Turns out that the line num column needs to be the line number the wharehouse would be on when ordered alphabetically counting from 0 instead of 1. So:
SELECT T0."WhsCode",
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T0."WhsCode") -1 AS "RowNumber"
FROM OWHS T0
ORDER BY T0."WhsCode"

Gives me a table of the corresponding line num to each warehouse. I can the VLOOKUP this in excel while creating the file to populate the linenum column. 

Hope this helps 🙂

Connor

entry.title: Re: Updating MinStock for a specific warehouse using DTW
entry.content:
Don't know how you have made it work without the LineNum, certainly doesn't for me. But for me the Linenum turned out to be the row number of the whs when sorting the whscode's alphabetically and counting from 0.

So:

SELECT T0."WhsCode", ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T0."WhsCode") -1 AS "RowNumber" FROM OWHS T0 ORDER BY T0."WhsCode"

Gives me a table of the corresponding line num to each warehouse. I can then VLOOKUP this in excel while creating the file to populate the linenum column. 

Hope this helps 🙂 Connor

entry.title: UOM List in Item Master Data
entry.content:
Hi,

I setup UOMs but I dont know where the setting is so I can get the system to pull from the list.  I dont have the area in yellow, only the field.

The file is from a working system, but I need to get it setup in another system.

Can someone help with this?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Edit Class Request Page
entry.content: did you ever get clarification on this? I am looking to edit the same for users. Though I would like to add Facility only

entry.title: How do I assign BRF+ 'configuration' in the MDG Consolidation update process step?
entry.content: In setting up a new Master Data Consolidation process using an 'Update' step, I'm attempting to use BRF+.  All documentation says to just select the BRF+ checkbox for the relevant tables under 'Configure Process Models and Field Properties', which I've done.  How do I get the BRF+ rules assigned to the step?  There is nothing in the 'Configuration' dropdown, as shown in the screenshot.

entry.title: Re: Setting Default Values for Create in ABAP RESTful app...
entry.content:
@Claudia_D , first you need to declare a controller extension; like so - in manifest.json:

 

"sap.ui5": {
  "extends": {
    "extensions": {
      "sap.ui.controllerExtensions": {
        "sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage.view.Details": {
          "controllerName": "mycomponent.ext.controller.MyEntityExt"

 

 

Then you create a new file, MyEntityExt.controller.js in the ext/controller folder of your project, and give it the following contents:

 

sap.ui.define([
	"sap/suite/ui/generic/template/extensionAPI/extensionAPI"
], function( extensionAPI ) {
	"use strict";
    return sap.ui.controller("mycomponent.ext.controller.MyEntityExt", {
        onInit: function() {
            this.extensionAPI.attachPageDataLoaded($.proxy(this.onPageLoaded, this)); 
        },
        onPageLoaded: function(oEvent){
.... as I wrote earlier.

entry.title: Re: "Service does not exist" while creating IAM app in ec...
entry.content:
Hi all
I found a way to fix that

In Eclipse IAM apps we can’t see our service because this is not released

Who to fix that?

In Service Binding at left you will see your service, check the column “API State”.

Set your mouse in your service and right click go to API State and there is where you can set you service as release.

After releasing it go to IAM Apps insert service and now service name will show your service

I hope that helps you

Thanks

entry.title: Are there any alternatives to ERP Prep for SAP certificate training?
entry.content:
So a couple of years back I used ERP prep for getting my certification and it was extremely reliable, I would say there was only a 5% error rate in their practice answers compared to the exam.

However, I took 2 back to back different exams and failed both after scoring less than 50% correct while I was scoring 70-80% on ERP prep. (First one, I did not recognise half the questions, second one, questions were mostly the same, answers were incredibly wrong though)

So, is there any similar alternative to ERP prep which is also reliable for questions/answers?

entry.title: The “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event in SAP Analytics Cloud Optimized Story
entry.content:
I am happy to share that our new table event, “onAfterDataEntryProcess()” , will be available with QRC1 2025 release in SAP Analytics Cloud!

What is “onDataAfterEntryProcess” event?

The “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event is an event associated with Table Widget in Optimized Story.

This event is triggered after user enters the data on the table and the data changes are processed in the backend. Data changes on the table widget can occur through any of fluid data entry, mass data entry, single data entry, copy and paste, distribution via the planning panel, or the “submitData” script function.

From the parameters of this event, you can get the context of changed table cells, as well as the value of cells before and after the change.

 

Use-cases for onAfterDataEntryProcess

The “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event offers the full flexibility to further process the data after the data changes have been made in the table widget, and to this end, here are some scenarios where “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event can be useful:

  1. If you prefer not to run a data action for the entire model, and instead wish to run the data action only on changed data to optimize the time or resource consumption. In this case you can utilize the event to gather the scope of the changed data. Subsequently, when you click a button or navigate to a different page, the scope of the changed data can be passed to a data action via data action parameters. This approach helps to reduce the scope of data action calculation, thereby enhancing its performance and resource consumption.
  2. Where execution of calculations (incl. data actions) is required to occur seamlessly after you enter data on the table. This ensures that the impact of the data changes is reflected almost in real-time.  However, direct referencing of data actions within the ‘onAfterDataEntryProcess” should be done judiciously given the potential impact on the system (see the section on Best Practices). 
  3. In scenarios where specific constraints for data correctness exist. In this scenario you can validate the correctness of the data in the “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event.

You are not restricted to the above use-cases. You have full flexibility to achieve the more use-cases whenever you expect to execute certain logic following data entry.

 

Details of onAfterDataEntryProcess()

onAfterDataEntryProcess (cells: IChangedCell[], effectiveContext: SelectionContext): void

The “cells” array consists of the changed table cells. This array can have multiple changed cells from various actions, including fluid data entry, mass data entry, copy and paste, distribution via the planning panel, or the “submitData” script function.  Additionally, the “cells” array may contain one single changed cell through single data entry.

Each changed cell in the array contains a new value, an old value, and the cell context. The cell context includes all the dimension members associated with the cell in both the row and column axes.

“effectiveContext” is a JSON object that contains the context of all the changed cells.

 

Example: In your table, Account is listed in the column axis and Product is listed in the row axis. You have made the following changes: the value in the 1st cell has been changed from 123 to 456, the value in the 2nd cell has been deleted(previously 789), and a new value of 123 has been added to the 3rd cell.

cells: [{  // the 1st changed cell

    oldValue: 123,

    newValue: 456, // change 123 to 456

    context: {

      Account: "[Account].[parentId].&[700000]",

      Product: "[Product].[parentId].&[PRD0005]",

    }

}, { // the 2nd changed cell

    oldValue: 789,

    newValue: null,  // delete 789

    context: {

      Account: "[Account].[parentId].&[530005]",

      Product: "[Product].[parentId].&[PRD0006]",

    }

}, {// the 3rd changed cell

    oldValue: null,

    newValue: 123,  // create new value 123

    context: {

      Account: "[Account].[parentId].&[700001]", 

      Product: "[Product].[parentId].&[PRD0007]",

    }

}

]

 

effectiveContext: { // the context of the changed cells

  Account: ["[Account].[parentId].&[700000]", "[Account].[parentId].&[530005]", "[Account].[parentId].&[700001]"],
  Product:["[Product].[parentId].&[PRD0005]", "[Product].[parentId].&[PRD0006]", "[Product].[parentId].&[PRD0007]"],
}

 

Please note that “Measure” is technically a special structure. Therefore, in the cell context, the measure is listed as CustomDimension1. For instance, when measure “Amount” is listed in either row or column axis in the table widget in the example above, the cell context is as follow:

    context: {

      Account: "[Account].[parentId].&[700001]",

      Product: "[Product].[parentId].&[PRD0007]",

      CustomDimension1: “Amount”,

    }

 

Examples

Example 1: Data action execution only on changed cells. 

To optimize the time and resource consumption, you prefer not to run a data action for the entire model, and instead wish to run the data action only on changed data.

As a story developer, you can write scripts for the “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event to gather the scope of the changed data. Subsequently, you can write scripts for a button click event or a page navigation event to pass the scope of the changed data to a data action via data action parameters.

Prerequisites

  • You've created a story and added the following widgets:
    • A table Table_1, which uses a planning model
    • A script variable ChangedData, whose data type is an Array of String
    • A button Button_1
    • A data action technical object DataAction_1, who uses a data action with "Region" parameter 

In the edit mode, you'd like to write scripts to gather the regions whose data has been changed, and execute a data action to calculate on the changed data.

1. Enter the following script for the table's “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event to gather the regions whose data has been changed.

 

for (var i=0;i<effectiveContext["Regions"].length; i++){    
 ChangedData.push(effectiveContext["Regions"][i]);

};

 

2. Enter the following script for the button's “onClick” event to execute a data action to calculate on the changed data via parameter. 

 

DataAction_1.setParameterValue("Region", { type: DataActionParameterValueType.Member,members:ChangedData});

var result =DataAction_1.execute();

 

This approach helps to reduce the scope of data action calculation, thereby enhancing its performance.

 

Example 2: Validate data correctness.

As a planning analyst, you may want to ensure that data entry for certain cells meets predefined conditions.   Assume for example that we have a constrain that the requested budget should not exceed the originally allocated amount by more than 20%. If this validation is not met, we want to issue a warning to the user.

Prerequisites

  • You've created a story and added the following widgets:
    • A table Table_1, which uses a planning model

In the edit mode, you'd like to write scripts to validate the entered data after data proceed.

Enter the following script for the table's “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event.

 

var allocatedBudget = 100; // this example uses a fixed allocated budget. You can also read the allocated budget from another version in your case.

For (var i=0;i<cells.length; i++){     
    if (ConvertUtils.stringToNumber(cells[i].newValue) > allocatedBudget * 1.2){
        Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Warning, "It is not allowed to exceed the originally allocated amount by more than 20%.")}
}

 

You use newValue from event parameters to validate the constraint.

In the view mode, if you change the value exceeding this constraint, a warning message will appear.

 

Best Practices

As the “onAfterDataEntryProcess” is associated with table widget, there are some best practices to optimize the functionality of this script in coherent with standard table workflow.

  1. Where data action execution is required as part of the calculation workflow, it is recommended to accumulate all data changes via the “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event, and then run data action for all changed in a single execution (e.g. by clicking a button or navigating to another page within story).
  2. Calling data actions directly within the “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event is recommended in selective scenarios, for example, a large amount of data is entered in a single end-user action (e.g., Mass Data Entry), and where corresponding data action execution is known to be quick.  Note, data changes through mass data entry are proceed after user clicks “Process Data” button.
  3. Where data actions are executed directly in the “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event, it is important that the data action being called does not change data in current table where the event itself is being called. Changing data in the current table through this event might cause a looped refresh, leading to unexpected refresh behavior in the table widget.  
  4. The “onAfterDataEntryProcess” execution blocks table UI actions in Single Data Entry (and Mass Data Entry) mode. Consequently, when Single Data Entry mode is enabled, it is not recommended to include heavy scripts in the event call so as to avoid the long wait times for the end-user.  
  5. To prevent an endless loop, avoid using the “submitData” script in the “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event. This is because the “submitData” script triggers this event, which in turn executes the “submitData” script again, creating an endless cycle.
  6. Page filters / story filters are not included in the “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event. The filter values can be retrieved from filter script functions. For more information about filters script functions, please refer to the following link:
    1. https://help.sap.com/doc/1639cb9ccaa54b2592224df577abe822/2024.25/en-US/index.html#InputControl
    2. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/18850a0e13944f53aa8a8b7c094ea29e/5bb384ea6b6342129bfa3823a2d859a7.html

entry.title: Is BI 4.3SP4 compatible with Crystal 2016?
entry.content:
Currently we are using BI Platform 4.2 SP09 and Crystal Report 2016.

We have just upgraded our Test Environment to 4.3 SP04 Patch 700, Is Crystal Report 2016 still fully Compatible or it is mandatory that we Upgrade to Crystal Report 2020. 

Please let me know your opinion.

entry.title: Can't find RateTable or RateTableVariable
entry.content:
I often use Rate Table Variables to generalize a Plan for multiple audiences. By not assigning a default rate table the rule outputs a zero value. The attainment is multiplied by zero equals a zero bonus. Obviously when a rate table is assigned, the bonus isn't zero, unless zero is one of the rates. The distinction can still be seen as the first output isn't linked to a rule and has none of the generic values that the last one does.

Now when I run a compensate and pay pipeline, I'm always faced with the error "42123 - Can''t find RateTable or RateTableVariable for Node: {0}, BN: {1}, Rule: {2}, SearchDate: {3}! (3)".

This error pains me as it is distracting me from identifying real errors in the plan. Does anyone know a good way around this issue?

entry.title: SAP Developer News, December 12th, 2024
entry.content:
Podcast: https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2024/12/12/sap-developer-news-december-12th-2024/

DESCRIPTION

Report from UKISUG

SAP BTP Innobytes November 2024

  • Video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cWVpcjIvZ4Y

CAP November 2024 Release

  • Capire November 2024 Release documentation https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/nov24

Migration resources SAP Business Process Automation

  • The Path Forward: SAP Build Process Automation https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/the-path-forward-sap-build-process-automation/ba-p/13938403

Simplifying SAP BTP Authentication with SAP Passport and Playwrite

  • Blog Post by Marian Zeis (6) Simplifying SAP BTP Authentication in Pipelines with SAP Passport and Playwright | LinkedIn

CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro
0:10 UKISUG
1:14 SAP BTP Innobytes November 2024
1:58 CAP November 2024 Release
4:58 Migration resources SAP Business Process Automation
5:45 Simplifying BTP Authentication

Transcription

[Intro] This is the SAP Developer News for December 12th, 2024.

[Antonio, DJ, & Daniel] Hola, SAP developers. We're here at the UK-ISUG Connect in Birmingham, where we've been here with our developer advocates in the SAP TechEd stand, running the developer garage and with our colleagues in the Ask the Experts booth. We've met a ton of people who've come to do tutorials. We've given some sessions, so I've given a session about SAP Build code and SAP Build with the DJ and through the floor we've met a lot of people who follow what we're doing and it has been very exciting. And we've had some great conversations in fact this is the ideal combination of hands-on keyboards and talking to each other face to face and learning from each other and reconnecting with each other. I've got to rush off now because I'm going to deliver another session, a hands-on session, on Terraform provider for SAP BTP. So, it's goodbye from me. And from me. And me. See you later. Bye-bye.

[DJ] The November 2024 edition of SAP BTP InnoBytes is out now with more fresh snackable insights on BTP. This time there's information on planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere. There's information on a new starter edition of SAP Integration Suite and on the document information extraction area. There's a new premium edition. Information on that is in this month's InnoBytes. Check the video out. It's only four minutes long. Link, as always, in the description.

[Ajay] Hello everyone. November release of SAP CAP 2024 is now available. So many things have happened since the first release of Getting Started and Cookbook guides. Many of them needed major updates and overhaul. Hence, Caphire now has revised Getting Started guides and also an overview of key concepts. Welcome page, getting started index pages, introduction, what is CAP, best practices and anti-patterns are some of the revised content. Learn more page combines information which was earlier spread across several pages. There is a new guide for aspect oriented modeling and improved CDL definition language reference. Coming to the CDS language and compiler topics, we have updates about the new CDL parser with significant size reduction and planned rollout in three phases. Now there is support for open intervals with add date "Assert.range" by wrapping the min and the max values in parenthesis. NodeJS's updates include a new plugin for RFC. CDS-RFC now enables importing RFC-enabled function modules from SAP S/4 HANA system. New CDS-I18n API can be used consistently for both serving localized SAP Fiori UIs as well as for localized messages at runtime. The default fuzziness threshold used by CAP Node.js is 0.7 and is now made configurable. Besides this, Adder Age "Search.fuzziness" threshold and Adder Age "Search.ranking" annotation is now supported by the CAP Node.js runtime. The new CLI command CDS debug lets you easily debug local or remote Node.js applications in Chrome DevTools. You can now also have automatic handler stubs in Node.js projects for both JavaScript and TypeScript with the command cds add handler. Basically in CAP Node.js, you can now create ECMAScript module projects with cds add esm command. For CAP Java, simpler recursive hierarchies can be realized with aggregate aggregation dot recursive hierarchies annotation. You can now filter and sort by sub-elements of cds.map elements in CAP Java. Enhanced instance-based authorization is supported in CAP Java with introduction of a new configuration option, reject-selected-unauthorized-entity. Last update is about MTX. In June release of Caphire,it was announced that only few annotations are allowed as extensions. You can now add exceptions for these restrictions, but at your own risk, using the annotations property. Please visit the Capphire documentation for further details. You can find the link to the documentation in the description.

[DJ] You probably know that SAP Workflow Management and SAP Intelligent RPA have been retired to be replaced by SAP Business Process Automation. Now you're going to have to do some migration and recently there have been some migration webinars to help you along the way. In Lujain's blog post there are also some resources listed that can support you in this migration and coming soon to this blog post will be the addition of links to these migration webinar replays in case you missed them. So check out Lujain's blog post and happy migrating!

[Thomas] We'd like to point your attention to a recent blog post by Marian Zeis that covers the topic of SAP BTP authentication but in the context of pipelines. He talks about how in automated pipelines can also be often be difficult to handle authentication mechanisms securely and simply and he offers an approach using the SAP Passport instead of certificate based authentication and using the Playwright module to simplify the processing of the passports. He does a really good job of describing the overall details of this solution, some code samples of how to set up the context with the certificate, and how to use the Playwright client certificate login package. He even has links to the GitHub repos and the package authentication, the package details, as as well as a code sample from his own GitHub repository on how to set up and use the scenario that he's describing. So this is a challenge that you face. We think you should definitely check out his blog post and see how he has solved the solution for himself and shared the solution with the community.

entry.title: Re: Start with SAP BTP Document Management Service (DMS)
entry.content:
Hi Olivier

We are in similar situation. Did you manaed to get VIM Fiori working with BTP DMS

Regrading your question:

For migration of existing attachments in OTAS, there are several programs available to do the migration as documented here: Content Repository Migration in mind ? - SAP Community

Regards

entry.title: Re: CPI Message Mapping source and target message
entry.content:
Hi TG,

Message Mapping is recommended when you have a documented and defined schema for your APIs. Additionally, when these APIs change, the documentation can be regenerated by the API provider (i.e., OData, SOAP (or even IDoc) adds or changes fields and definitions, and metadata is automatically updated. Then, an edmx or XSD schema file can be generated or imported automatically).

If this is not the case, it is recommended that you use (Groovy) Scripts or XSLT because these options are not fixed or bound to a known schema. I prefer Groovy because it can be used with delimited (comma, pipe, tab, etc.) files, fixed-length files, compressed (zip or archive) files, XML, JSON, YAML, and more.

JSON: https://groovy-lang.org/processing-json.html
XML: https://groovy-lang.org/processing-xml.html
YAML: https://groovy-lang.org/processing-yaml.html
Delimited: https://groovy.apache.org/blog/reading-and-writing-csv-files

Keep integrating 🖖🏻
Best regards,

Ricardo

entry.title: Re: Vendor missing inside PR created through MRP Run
entry.content:
Hello

Please observe that the source list validity is checked against the requirement date, not the PR date. 
It means that, if MRP created the PR to cover a requirement that is outside the source list validity date and subsequently rescheduled the PR (to avoid a start in the past, for example), then the source of supply defined in the source list won't be considered.
Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Open Text VIM with BTP DMS
entry.content:
Hi Team

Open Text VIM documentation says that Open Text VIM  Fiori may not work with BTP DMS

Has anyone being able to make Open Text VIM Fiori work with BTP DMS (Document Management Service)

Regards

Summit

entry.title: Re: Clarification about BS22 Changes for System Status in...
entry.content: I would close this question as I think I will look for development than making change in BS22. But I understand now, it is still a possibility to do in BS22 and that may overwritten in some cases.

Hi, 

Just regarding the comments, you need to configure the scope item and active, so this solution should be implemented for payment approval.

This configuration must to be ensured with your consultant team.

Hope you understand.

Best Regards,
Erick Goulardt
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Fiori attachments storage into OpenText archive

entry.title: Re: Enhancement in IW42
entry.content: Thanks Manfred, I will keep this in mind and do the checks during S/4 migration.

entry.title: Re: Replacement for SAP SRM when migrating to S/4 HANA On...
entry.content: Thanks for reply Venkat

entry.title: Re: Document Type defaulted on FI invoice
entry.content:
Hi colleague,

Can you please find the solution in this documentation:
2571830 - Default Journal Entry Type in FIORI APP - SAP for Me

Hope you understand.

Best Regards,
Erick Goulardt
SAP Support

entry.title: How to edit employee's data in Latest People Profile?
entry.content: We are going live with recruiting module and latest People Profile. However, I noticed that employee's are unable to edit their personal data in the latest version of the people profile, despite the fact all the necessary authorisation is granted to employee? How to fix the issue?

entry.title: Re: Trainer Bar Back Button
entry.content:
Hi Justin,

Unfortunately, there is no way to modify the behaviour of the back button to go to the previously opened page.  The back button on the browser will also not work because a new URL is not called each time a new Book Page is opened.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: codigo pdf147 en wms sap ingreso de imei's formulario con zebra tc27
entry.content:
un gusto en saludarlos comunidad espero puedan ayudarme con una consulta acerca de wms sap junto a velocity web

Mi cliente un importador de equipos moviles (celulares samsung) maneja equipos ZEBRA TC26 y VELOCITY WEB para su wms sap, ellos tienen un módulo para registrar sus equipos que importan en especifico su cliente SAMSUNG les manda en un código PDF147 con 10 imei’s y en dicho modulo antes mencionado el cliente escanea, pero no se agregan los imeis completamente, algunas veces 1 otras 2 o 3. Te adjunto videos e imágenes.

 

Consulte a zebra sobre el tema me indicaron consultar a ivanti también ya que la web carga desde ahí. En la app de prueba de zebra DWdemo si lee todos los imeis de ese code pdf147

Que podría estar pasando?

entry.title: Copy custom field from sales order line item to PR line item
entry.content:
Hi,

We are working on SAP public cloud implementation. I have a custom field at sales order line item. In third party process, I would like this custom field to be copied to corresponding line of purchase requisition. In custom field App, there is no option to carry forward the custom field from sales order line to purchase requisition line. 

Did anyone experience such scenario?

Thanks,

Ketan

entry.title: Re: How to use the OData Client Proxy in SAP S/4 HANA or How to use the OData Service Consumption Mo
entry.content:
Hi Andre,

Is it also possible to call this odata service from a RAP BO (e.g., custom action or in the SAVE_MODIFIED method for unmanaged save?)

I tried consuming the service using the same exact code I had in my console app and I got some errors which I did not get when I was testing it via the console in ADT.

Do we need to code it differently or do we need to set something before we can consume it from a custom RAP BO?

entry.title: Re: Prevent page break within tablesection
entry.content:
Hello,

As I can see, solution accepted here is to totally create a new table and to use subform. I recently was stuck with same requirement to stop Table section Page Break. It got resolved by "Unchecking" the Allow Page Break within Content for table itself. So, just wanted to share that.

Regards,

Harsh Bansal

entry.title: Re: Flexible Pickup&Delivery Window Interpretation
entry.content:
Hi @GRABLERE 

Thank you for the helpful post! I noticed there is limited information regarding times and dates on the website. After reading through the entire explanation, I have a question that I need clarification on.

In my case, the business requires that the departure time be consistently set to 7 AM during FO creation. I have configured the Resource Calendar (Variant + Shift) and assigned it to each location. However, the calculated departure time still shows variations.

According to the information provided, the departure time appears to fluctuate based on other factors, such as travel time or the requested date.

What would be the best way to ensure that the departure times are automatically set to a fixed value?

Thank you in advance for any input!
